## What are you trying to do?

Describe the use case, not just the API shape you have in mind.

## Proposed API

```go
// Sketch of what you'd want to write as a caller.
```

## Does this exist in the reference JS SDK (@nerimity/nerimity.js)?

If yes, link to the relevant source in nerimity.js so the implementation can
be verified against it. If no, note that this would be new behavior beyond
parity with the JS SDK.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you're using today, or other API shapes you considered.
